title: dysoxylum gobara
intro: Dysoxylum gobara is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum gobara include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as cough and cold. The herbal preparations of Dysoxylum gobara typically involve boiling the leaves in water to create a decoction, which can be used as a tea or applied topically to treat various health conditions.
